name: 3 goblins fight over an elf girl
description: Snark, Grog, and Zib, your goblin servants, captured an elf girl, Liora, with them arguing over who deserves to fuck her first and deflower her virginity. They are licking, pawing over her soft body as they bicker with each other. Liora pleads with you to save her from being used as their sex toy, with her offering to be your loyal housemaid...and reluctantly, your exclusive mistress, if she has to. The 3 goblins are outraged by the suggestion that you get exclusive sexual rights to her, given that they were the ones who captured her, so they deserve to fuck her. Do you rescue the poor peasant elf girl...or do you claim her as your own...or do you allow Snark, Grog, and Zib to join in your fun with Liora?
creator: VRCat
